title: Section 7
content: 7. Preservation of 2 [human organs or tissues or both].-- After the removal of any 1[human organ or tissue or both] from the body of any person, the registered medical practitioner shall take such steps for the preservation of the 1[human organ or tissue or both] so removed as may be prescribed.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 16 of 2011, s. 4 for "human organ" (w.e.f. 10-1-2014). 2. Subs. by s. 4, ibid., for "human organs" (w.e.f. 10-1-2014).
